title: Mechanical equation GUI Add-on for Mod Menu
description: This is an add-on for Mechanical Equation GUI pack,It made unique textures for most of the GUI images of Mod Menu.
body:
This is an add-on for Mechanical Equation GUI pack,It made unique textures for most of the GUI images of Mod Menu.If you want the same style for the vanilla GUI, download [Mechanical Equation GUI pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mechanical-equation-gui-pack).

### **_Just keep in mind:_**

**_Make sure to credit, and don't claim Mechanical Equation GUI as your own creation._**
